text.title: trend-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trend-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Letting the agent pick its own sources for numeric evidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unconstrained source selection collapses to "search Google, cite first SEO-spam page". Pin the allow-list of authoritative sources in the system prompt.

failure-mode.description: Using Google Trends on a low-volume term without checking if the term was recently renamed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "AI agent" and "agentic AI" split the trend curve. Synonym-merge before scoring to avoid treating the same trend as two different signals.

failure-mode.description: Treating a single viral HN or Reddit thread as a trend confirmation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require >= 3 independent sources before stage-promoting a trend. One viral post is a data point, not a trend.
